title: Anatomy of an R Line Plot
description: A visual breakdown of the key components required to create a line plot using ggplot2 in R, showing their hierarchical relationship.
relationships: Data Frame is passed into ggplot()
aes() is defined within ggplot() to map variables
geom_line() is added as a layer to draw the line
Labs & Theme are added as layers for formatting
The complete layered object renders as the Final Plot
